title: Academic Advising Procedures
content:
ACADEMIC ADVISING PROCEDURES - MORGAN STATE COMPUTER SCIENCE DEPARTMENT

DEGREE WORKS:
Degree Works is an online advising audit tool that helps you track your progress towards graduation.
Link: https://www.morgan.edu/registrar/degreeworks

FORMS AND PROCEDURES:

Permission to Take Courses Off-Campus:
Request to take courses off-campus. Video tutorial: https://youtu.be/4LlY9yyD9o0
Policy:
- Off-campus course enrollment is restricted with a few exceptions
- You must submit the official form on the Registrar's website
- Core Computer Science courses must be taken on campus and are NOT eligible for off-campus credit
- Seniors are generally NOT allowed to take courses off-campus except under very specific circumstances - please discuss with the department chair directly
- Non-seniors may pursue an articulation agreement with Morgan State University for off-campus courses

Change of Major Form:
Request to change your major, minor, or concentration.
Video tutorial: https://youtu.be/Qjl2h9Z6SGo?si=EuQ8pWY8cqa08f2Q

Excess Credit Request Form:
Request to take additional credits for the semester.
Link: https://www.morgan.edu/office-of-the-registrar/priority-registration-time-ticket-groupings

Withdrawal/Cancellation Form:
Available via WebSIS Student Self-Service.
Instructions: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ADMINISTRATION/OFFICES/registrar/Student%20Communication.pdf

Course Registration Override:
Contact Ms. Wendy Smith at Wendy.Smith@morgan.edu
Override requests must be submitted to the academic department
Overrides are not guaranteed - department chairperson's decision is final

How to Access Registrar Forms:
1. Go to WebSIS Student Self-Service and click 'Service Requests'
2. Enter your Morgan State University email and click 'Continue'
3. Do NOT click 'Sign in with Google', 'Microsoft', or 'Apple'
4. Launch the Dashboard
